changeSet.author: custom
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO plugins ( identifier, name, description, javascriptModuleFile, functionsViewTemplate, settingsViewTemplate, namelocalizationkey, settingsPermission, functionsPermission, deviceFunctionsPermission, enabledForDevice ) VALUES ( 'devicereset', 'Device Reset', 'Remote reboot, lock and factory reset', 'app/components/plugins/devicereset/devicereset.module.js', 'app/components/plugins/devicereset/views/devicereset.html', NULL, 'plugin.devicereset.localization.key.name', 'plugin_devicereset_access', 'plugin_devicereset_access', 'plugin_devicereset_access', TRUE );

changeSet.author: custom
custom
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE plugin_devicereset_status ( id serial NOT NULL CONSTRAINT plugin_devicereset_status_pr_key PRIMARY KEY, customerId INT NOT NULL REFERENCES customers (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, deviceId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES devices (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, factoryReset BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, reboot BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, lock BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, lockMessage VARCHAR(500), passwordReset VARCHAR(100) );
